LanguageData.Ammo_6mmSmartGyrojet_FMJ.label: 6mm Smart rocket (FMJ)
LanguageData.Ammo_6mmSmartGyrojet_FMJ.description: Overengineered pistol rounds that utilizes miniature rockets for propulsion instead of gunpowder. It features limited self guidance.
LanguageData.Ammo_6mmSmartGyrojet_AP.label: 6mm Smart rocket (AP)
LanguageData.Ammo_6mmSmartGyrojet_AP.description: Overengineered pistol rounds that utilizes miniature rockets for propulsion instead of gunpowder. It features limited self guidance.
LanguageData.Ammo_6mmSmartGyrojet_HP.label: 6mm Smart rocket (HP)
LanguageData.Ammo_6mmSmartGyrojet_HP.description: Overengineered pistol rounds that utilizes miniature rockets for propulsion instead of gunpowder. It features limited self guidance.
LanguageData.Bullet_6mmSmartGyrojet_FMJ.label: 6mm Smart bullet (FMJ)
LanguageData.Bullet_6mmSmartGyrojet_AP.label: 6mm Smart bullet (AP)
LanguageData.Bullet_6mmSmartGyrojet_HP.label: 6mm Smart bullet (HP)
